title: Add info on Skopeo image to README.md
body: In the Buildah repo, we had a request for a ptr to the container image location in the docs.  We've added similar to Podman and Buildah.

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

@cgwalters Several times recently we’ve seen `ostree-rs-ext` tests failing with
```
    1: skopeo failed: time="2024-05-04T00:19:54Z" level=fatal msg="initializing source oci:/proc/self/fd/3:: open /proc/self/fd/3/index.json: no such file or directory"
````
e.g. https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5588090834649088 . Could there be some race in that code?
